active_ingredients.name: Deltamethrin (1.25% EC / 2.5% WP)
active_ingredients.use_case: Space spraying and thermal fogging for adults

active_ingredients.name: Diflubenzuron (25% WP)
active_ingredients.use_case: Insect Growth Regulator (IGR) for long-term larval control

precautions: Avoid spraying near fish ponds (toxic to aquatic life)
Ensure no humans/pets in the room during fogging

pest_control_data.breeding_triggers: Monsoon/Spring; presence of food waste and cluttered burrows

active_ingredients.name: Zinc Phosphide (80%)
active_ingredients.use_case: Acute poisoning for heavy infestations (Burrow baiting)

precautions: Dispose of carcasses strictly to prevent secondary poisoning of pets

pest_control_data.breeding_triggers: High human turnover, warm indoor temperatures, travel seasons

active_ingredients.name: Clothianidin (Sumi Pride)
active_ingredients.use_case: Residual spray on furniture and mattress seams

active_ingredients.name: Hydroprene (Gentrol)
active_ingredients.use_case: Mixing with spray to prevent nymphs from maturing

active_ingredients.name: Silica Gel / Diatomaceous Earth
active_ingredients.use_case: Dusting in wall voids and electrical outlets

precautions: Do not spray directly on skin-contact surfaces of mattresses without proper drying

active_ingredients.name: N/A (Relocation Preferred)
active_ingredients.use_case: Safe removal of hives to prevent stinging hazards

active_ingredients.name: Essential Oils (Menthol/Thymol)
active_ingredients.use_case: Temporary repellent to prevent hive building

precautions: DO NOT USE PESTICIDES unless there is an immediate life threat (Anaphylaxis)
